title: odoglossa heterophylla
intro: Odoglossa heterophylla, also known as the Heterophylla, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in the treatment of various respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Odoglossa heterophylla is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
